title: delphinium consolida subsp. divaricatum
intro: Delphinium consolida subsp. divaricatum, also known as the bee or larkspur, is a perennial plant that belongs to the poppy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Delphinium consolida subsp. divaricatum include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and acting as a natural antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal remedy.
